description: Copy of a story about the edicts against the Jews in Baghdad and how they were saved. Dating: ca. 1120 CE. The scribe reused numerous documents to create this booklet; see individual PGP records. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, pp. 228-229.) VMR. ASE.
description_he: העתק סיפור על גזרות נגד יהודים בבגדד ועל הצלתם, כ-1120
